name: Copper Basin Retreat
tagline: 5 Acres of High Desert with Mountain Views in Southern Utah
description:
Five acres of red-rock high desert outside Cedar City, Utah — gateway to three national parks. The property sits at 5,600 feet with unobstructed views of the Markagunt Plateau and distant Pine Valley Mountains. The soil is firm and sandy, dotted with juniper and pinyon pine.

Cedar City is a growing college town with full amenities just 15 minutes away. Zion National Park is an hour south, Bryce Canyon 90 minutes east, and Cedar Breaks National Monument is practically in your backyard. Power runs along the road frontage — this is a build-ready lot in one of the most scenic corridors in the American West.

details.terrain: High desert with juniper and pinyon
details.restrictions: Residential use, no junkyard or salvage

photos.alt: Red desert landscape with distant mountains
photos.caption: Views of the Markagunt Plateau from the property

photos.alt: Juniper trees on sandy desert terrain
photos.caption: Native juniper and pinyon pine dot the landscape
Spectacular sunsets over the western horizon

name: Cascade Timberland
tagline: 10 Acres of Pacific Northwest Forest Near Mt. Rainier
description:
Ten acres of towering Douglas fir and western red cedar in the shadow of Mt. Rainier. A year-round creek runs along the northern boundary, and the property backs up to Gifford Pinchot National Forest — giving you millions of acres of wilderness as your backyard.

The town of Packwood is a classic mountain community with a general store, cafes, and access to White Pass Ski Area. A well has already been drilled and capped on the property. The building site sits on a gentle rise above the creek, with filtered views of the Cascade Range through the timber.

photos.alt: Towering Douglas fir forest in the Cascades
photos.caption: Old-growth Douglas fir and western red cedar
Year-round creek along the northern boundary
Filtered views of Mt. Rainier from the property

photos.alt: Misty morning in Pacific Northwest forest
photos.caption: Classic Pacific Northwest atmosphere

name: Redwood Coast Parcel
tagline: 2 Acres of Coastal Forest in Humboldt County, California
description:
Two acres of coastal redwood forest just one mile from the Pacific Ocean near Trinidad, California. The property is studded with mature redwoods and Sitka spruce, with a natural clearing perfect for a home site. You can hear the ocean on quiet mornings.

Trinidad is a tiny, stunning coastal village perched above a natural harbor. The lot has power and community water at the road, and the county has approved septic. Trinidad Head, Patrick's Point State Park, and the endless beaches of Humboldt County are all within minutes. This is one of the most beautiful and affordable stretches of the California coast.

details.utilities: Electric and community water at lot line
details.terrain: Coastal redwood forest with natural clearing

photos.alt: Coastal redwood trees with filtered sunlight
photos.caption: Mature coastal redwoods on the property
Natural building site with ocean breeze
The Pacific Ocean is just one mile away
Trinidad Head — minutes from the property
